overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character in wizard robes walking through the Great Hall. The scene features Gothic architecture with high vaulted ceilings, long wooden dining tables, and students moving about. Natural light streams through large arched windows creating dramatic shadows across the stone floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with dining tables

events.description: character stops walking and comes to a halt near the wooden table

agents.ego_description: walking through the Great Hall toward the center tables, approaching a seated student

notable_agents.action: student sitting at the wooden table, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large stone archway framing the left side of the view with intricate carvings
long wooden banquet table with benches, typical of medieval dining halls
tall Gothic windows allowing natural light to stream into the hall
upper level balcony with stone railings visible in the background
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the high vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a student character entering the Great Hall. The camera walks forward through the Gothic interior, passing under a large stone archway. The hall features long wooden dining tables, high vaulted ceilings, and dramatic natural lighting from large arched windows. The character approaches a seated student at one of the tables and comes to a stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with dining tables

events.description: another student walks past the camera from right to left in the foreground

agents.ego_description: standing still near the table, looking around the hall while other students move about

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from right to left past the camera

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary near the wooden table, observing the Great Hall. The camera pans slightly as another student walks past in the foreground. The Gothic architecture remains prominent with the stone archway framing the left side and natural light continuing to cast shadows across the stone floor. The environment feels lively with students moving in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with dining tables

agents.ego_description: continuing to stand near the table, watching other students pass by in the hall

notable_agents.action: student with blonde hair walking from right to left past the camera

segments.scene_description: The final segment maintains the stationary position near the wooden table. Another student walks past the camera, contributing to the ambient activity of the hall. The Gothic stone architecture, high ceilings, and warm natural lighting remain constant. The character continues to observe the surroundings as other students move through the background, maintaining the atmosphere of a busy school dining hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a steady walk through a grand Gothic interior to a stationary observation of a bustling dining hall. It begins by following a student character as they pass under a massive stone archway and move deep into the Great Hall, passing long wooden tables beneath high vaulted ceilings. As the character approaches a seated student and comes to a stop, the camera shifts from forward motion to a slight pan, capturing the play of natural light and dramatic shadows across the stone floor. The scene then settles into a stationary view, where the environment feels increasingly lively as multiple students walk past in the foreground and background. Finally, the camera remains fixed, emphasizing the ambient activity and the scale of the architecture within the busy school atmosphere.
